creator: stijn@win.tue.nl
text:
> State-Changed-From-To: open->analyzed 
> State-Changed-By: will 
> State-Changed-When: Fri Jun 9 17:28:59 PDT 2000 
> State-Changed-Why:  
> I've reviewed your PR and am ready to commit it to the tree. 
> However, I'm not sure this port belongs in x11.  How about 
> x11-wm? 

Well it's definitely not a windowmanager - it's more like a utility for
GTK-apps. So maybe x11-toolkits? Or maybe in misc, because kdeutils and
gnomeutils are also located there...

But if you think x11-wm is better, that's fine with me.

--Stijn
